cart.title: Mission Requisitions
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please register a billing station address to proceed with your requisition.
cart.howToPay: How do you want to transfer credits?
cart.addCardPrompt: To register a Credit Chip, please activate the Register New Credit Chip function.
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: No unpaid Resource Allocation Notices detected.
cart.thankYouForOrder: Starfleet thanks you for your requisition, Officer!
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please transfer credits to activate your service. Upon receipt of credits, your service module will be immediately brought online.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After credits are transferred, open a Distress Signal ticket with the transaction ID, stardate, and amount transmitted. Fleet Command will manually credit the payment.

creditCard.name: Officer Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Authentication is required before your Credit Chip can be used for requisitions. The Galactic Federation will charge your Credit Chip two micro-amounts each under 1.00 standard credit.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will appear on your credits ledger statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If you do not detect these charges, please contact your Credit Chip issuer for further details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are solely for verification purposes and will be voided within 3-5 standard days, depending on your financial institution.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under 1.00 standard credit each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Authenticate with your Credit Chip's financial terminal or contact your institution to verify the two micro-amounts charged. They often appear under Pending Transactions. These authorization charges will disappear within approximately 3-5 standard days depending on your institution.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to your Credit Chip. Values must be in standard credits (USD).
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your Credit Chip ledger may display in a different currency than required on the final confirmation screen described above. If your Credit Chip ledger does not display the original transaction amounts in the required currency, you will need to contact your Credit Chip institution. They should be able to provide the two charge amounts in the original currency.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove Credit Chip {card} from the manifest?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This Credit Chip has been authenticated and cleared for use in our system.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Activate this Credit Chip for use.
creditCard.removeCreditCard: Remove this Credit Chip from Manifest

pay.title: Transfer Credits for Resource Allocation Notices
pay.autoRedirect: You will be automatically redirected to the transfer terminal.

paymentSuccess.title: Credits Transfer Successful
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Starfleet thanks you for your service, Officer! Your transaction has been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Credits Transfer Methods
paymentTypes.ccNote: All Credit Chips must be authenticated before use. To authenticate, activate the "Authenticate" function.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to purge Resource Allocation Notice {id}?

prepays.title: Pre-Allocated Mission Credits
prepays.autoUseInvoices: Automatically apply to resource allocation notices:
prepays.showingPage: Displaying sector {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically apply to new resource allocation notices
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are you sure you want to purge Pre-Mission Credits #{id} and its associated history log?
